title: Shinobu, the Ninja Apprentice, Appears
overview: First, ninja trainee Shinobu is sent on a mission by her Head Master to collect underwear from high school girls! Her first target? Kaede Shiranui!

title: The Master Appears
overview: Shinobu takes Kaede on a crazy adventure to the Valley of the Ninja to meet her Head Master!

title: Ninja, Enjoying a Cherry Blossom Party
overview: First, rainy weather drives bored ninjas into looking for the Loch Ness Monster in their pond... only to find an Onsokumaru, eating crocodile instead!

title: Shinobu, Date with Kaede
overview: Girl-girl dating? Can this be allowed?! Ninja-master Onsokumaru and masked-nobleman Sasuke decide to keep a close eye on this spectacle of nature!

title: Onsokumaru, Getting Angry
overview: First, Shinobu's little sister, Miyabi, is a total brat! Onsokumaru decides it's time for a little one-on-one... just her, him, and his crocodile power-suit!

title: Shinobu, Running Away
overview: Shinobu's kicked out of the manor! Maybe Kaede's family would be interested in adopting a ninja into their family... Sister-sister bath time?

title: Ninja, Getting Hot
overview: Rising temperatures provide a perfect opportunity for Onsokumaru to get Shinobu and Kaede into in their swimsuits, and hopefully into a lusty embrace as well!

title: Miyabi, Falling in Love
overview: Miyabi's got a crush! Will the Ninja Pharmaceutical Group's special love potion help things along? And what effect could this have on the Miyabi Fan Club?

title: Onsokumaru, Goes to Hell
overview: Onsokumaru gets sent to Hell! But, Hell can't be all that bad! There are demon schoolgirls, demon wives, demon in-laws... Well, the demon in-laws could be kind of bad.

title: Ninja, Enjoying the Summer Festival
overview: It's too hot to train, so the ninjas have little to do but sit around and read dirty magazines... Perhaps, a little summer festival could brighten the mood!

title: A Typhoon Is Here
overview: A typhoon is coming! With Shinobu stuck at Kaede's house, the ninja manor turns into a terrible sausage fest! Witness Onsokumaru's darkest hour!

title: Ninja, Going Mushroom Hunting
overview: When Onsokumaru lends his wisdom to a mushroom picking expedition, the ninjas are in for a magical ride! Especially when their tasty treats end up being poisonous and hallucinogenic!

title: Onsokumaru, Gets Stuck
overview: The ball of steel finds himself literally stuck to his arch-nemesis, Miyabi! With Onsokumaru melded to her clothes, the gang is in search of a way to detach him, but it's starting to look like the only way may be... a Miyabi strip show?!

title: Shinobu in Disguise
overview: Kaede's school is having a festival, complete with a haunted house! Perhaps Shinobu would make a good addition, but what costume would be the best? A cat-girl? An erotic imp?

title: A Monster Plant Going Wild
overview: Shinobu's got a new pet - a cute and cuddly 15-foot tall monster plant! With ninjas, butterflies, and cats going missing, all fingers are pointing towards Shinobu's hulking piece of "cuddly" vegetation. But it couldn't possibly be responsible! Could it?

title: Girls, Getting Warm
overview: Onsokumaru is foaming at the mouth for a chance to see some skin! Unfortunately, Miyabi's stationed her magical guardians in a defensive perimeter around the women's bathing area. But where there is a ninja will... there is a ninja way!

title: Kaede Catches a Cold
overview: Poor Kaede is a little under the weather. It's a good thing Shinobu and Onsokumaru are around to take care of her! Of course, Onsokumaru has his own agenda - like hitting on Kaede's mom!

title: Ninja Christmas
overview: Deck the halls with ninja stars! The ninjas are having their first Christmas ever and it's up to Kaede to teach them about the holiday spirit! But what kind of gift do you get for a ninja?

title: Ninja, Cursed
overview: Then, a little "end of the year cleaning" yields a box filled with misfortune! While Kaede, Shinobu and the rest of the ninjas are subjected to one bizarre curse after another, Onsokumaru and Sasuke are left out! Hey, that's not very fair!

title: Sasukeden Begins
overview: The real star of Ninja Nonsense finally gets his own episode! Expect more explosions, more naked girls, and more full-throttle Sasuke action! So good, you'll need to watch it a second time!

title: Onsokumaru's Secret
overview: The mysterious secret that Onsokumaru alluded to in episode 6 has finally come to light (thanks to a little "persuasion" from the ninjas)! The shocking truth may change everything for Shinobu...

title: Farewell, 2x2=Shinobuden
overview: Shinobu's goal of becoming a full-fledged ninja is finally within her grasp! Now she just has to pass the dreaded Ninja Graduation Exam! She'll need to use every technique that Onsokumaru's ever taught her! Her chances don't exactly look promising, do they?
